# TheQuestOfferwall (iOS SDK)

Embeds The Quest offerwall in a hosted WKWebView with a native header. Public API is
essentially one call: `show()`. Swift 5.9, iOS 15+, no external dependencies.
UIKit + WebKit only. Package/product/target name: TheQuestOfferwall.

## Install
- CocoaPods (primary): `pod 'TheQuestOfferwall'`
- SPM: reference the repo's `ios/` package directory, product `TheQuestOfferwall`.

## Configure (build-time, Bundle.main Info.plist)
- `TheQuestAppId` (String, REQUIRED): 10-char app id (not secret). Missing/empty => show() logs an error and aborts (no crash).
- `TheQuestEnvironment` (String, optional): "production" (default) or "staging".
- Environment base URLs: production=https://quest.humanlabs.world, staging=https://quest.seriesc.dev

## Public API
```swift
import TheQuestOfferwall

public final class TheQuest {
  public static let shared: TheQuest
  public func show(
    from presenter: UIViewController,
    userId: String,
    launchProvider: (@Sendable (_ userId: String) async throws -> LaunchToken)? = nil,
    onClose: (() -> Void)? = nil
  )
}

public struct LaunchToken: Sendable {
  public let ts: String
  public let nonce: String
  public let sig: String
  public let locale: String?
  public init(ts: String, nonce: String, sig: String, locale: String? = nil)
}

public enum TheQuestEnvironment: String, Sendable { case production, staging }
public enum TheQuestError: Error { case invalidLaunchURL }
public enum SDKInfo { public static let version: String } // "0.1.0"
```

## Modes
- Standard (launchProvider == nil): unsigned. `show(from:userId:)`.
- Secure (launchProvider != nil): the closure is awaited on EVERY show() to fetch
  `{ ts, nonce, sig, locale? }` from YOUR backend (which holds the app secret; never
  embed it). A spinner shows while awaiting; a thrown error shows a retry screen.

## Launch URL
`{base}/?app_id={appId}&user_id={userId}` + (secure only) `&ts=&nonce=&sig=` + `&locale=` (always).
All values percent-encoded. Standard-mode locale = device locale mapped to en/id/es/pt
(fallback en). Secure-mode locale = exactly the locale the backend signed (empty if none).

## WebView / bridge (see docs/BRIDGE.md)
- Full-screen OfferwallViewController: 52pt native header (leading ✕ close button, optional centered title), WKWebView below, safe-area respected.
- Persistent WKWebsiteDataStore.default() (keeps qs_session cookie).
- customUserAgent = default UA + " TheQuestSDK/<version> (ios)".
- Bridge injected at .atDocumentStart as window.TheQuestNative with platform="ios",
  version=<sdk semver>; `_post` -> window.webkit.messageHandlers.theQuestNative.postMessage(obj).
- Native handles web->native messages: openUrl -> UIApplication.open (external); close -> dismiss + onClose; ready -> hide spinner.
- Spinner until `ready` or didFinish; retry screen on didFail / didFailProvisionalNavigation.
- Offerwall webview is never navigated cross-origin; openUrl opens externally only.
- onClose fires once (header button, web close, or interactive dismissal).

## Files
- Sources/TheQuestOfferwall/TheQuest.swift — singleton + show()
- Sources/TheQuestOfferwall/Config/TheQuestConfig.swift — Info.plist reader + Environment + base URL
- Sources/TheQuestOfferwall/Models/LaunchToken.swift
- Sources/TheQuestOfferwall/WebView/OfferwallViewController.swift
- Sources/TheQuestOfferwall/WebView/LaunchURLBuilder.swift — pure, unit-tested URL builder
- Sources/TheQuestOfferwall/Bridge/BridgeScript.swift — injected JS + message parsing
- Sources/TheQuestOfferwall/SDKInfo.swift — version
- Sources/TheQuestOfferwall/Resources/PrivacyInfo.xcprivacy — privacy manifest (no tracking)
